roles.description: Technicians perform on-site robot installs and calibrations. They wear Acme uniforms, follow Acme SOPs, and are dispatched via Acme's scheduling system. Work is ongoing with weekly hours and standing Monday safety meetings.
behavioral_control: Receives detailed instructions and SOPs from Acme supervisors
Required to attend weekly 8am team standup (set schedule)
Training provided by Acme on installation procedures
financial_control: Uses Acme-owned tools and diagnostic equipment
No significant investment in own tools or materials
Paid hourly per work order via Acme platform
relationship_type: No written contract specifying contractor independence
Services are key to Acme's core business (robot installs)

roles.description: Project-based CAD design support for a new gripper assembly. Consultant sets own hours, works for multiple clients, bills fixed-fee milestones, and provides their own CAD workstation and software licenses.
behavioral_control: Delivers work to functional specs, no day-to-day supervision
No required meetings beyond milestone reviews
financial_control: Can realize profit or loss based on time/labor forecasting
relationship_type: Written contract defines independent contractor relationship

roles.description: Firmware developer embedded with the controls team for 12+ months. Works on-site Mon–Fri 9–5, attends daily standups, uses Acme hardware lab, commits code to Acme repos, and requires manager approval for PTO.
behavioral_control: Daily standups and sprint planning directed by Acme
Receives code reviews and mandatory internal trainings
financial_control: Uses Acme hardware lab and equipment
Paid biweekly on an hourly basis
relationship_type: Work is integral to Acme's core product firmware
No benefits provided but implied permanency

roles.description: Sales engineer assigned exclusive Northern California territory. Provided Acme business cards, expected to attend weekly pipeline reviews, and must follow Acme pricing and discount policies.
behavioral_control: Weekly pipeline calls led by Acme Sales Director
Required to use CRM and follow internal processes
financial_control: No reimbursement for routine travel expenses
Markets primarily Acme products, limited to exclusive territory
relationship_type: Services are a regular part of the business
